sizing_rule.note: Position size inversely scaled to 20-day ATR volatility. Risk 0.5% per trade divided by volatility-adjusted stop distance (20-day ATR × multiplier). Higher volatility → smaller positions; lower volatility → larger positions.

source_rule_text: Size positions by dividing total account risk (as a percentage of equity) by the volatility-adjusted stop distance, scaled by the contract/instrument multiplier.
